scope.question: coverage_repair: Only two active no-results registry records are present. The prior coverage-repair session also deferred fisetin frailty registry candidates NCT03430037 and NCT03675724, but this batch could not fetch ClinicalTrials.gov source snapshots for those registries, so broader current fisetin and D+Q trial surveillance remains incomplete. Suggested action: Run a source-snapshot-backed ClinicalTrials.gov surveillance pass for NCT03430037, NCT03675724, senolytics, D+Q, fisetin, and senescence-targeting terms; add no-results status records only when fetched registry snapshots support them.

inputs.summary: Bounded context pack for the senolytics registry-surveillance coverage gap repair.
Active-trials registry gap requiring ClinicalTrials.gov surveillance for NCT03430037, NCT03675724, senolytics, D+Q, fisetin, and senescence-targeting terms.
Target coverage assessment updated to add the two source-snapshot-backed fisetin frailty trial-watch records while keeping broader registry surveillance open.
Coordinator-recommended coverage-repair job for the senolytics registry-surveillance breadth gap.

outputs.summary: Fetched ClinicalTrials.gov v2 snapshots for NCT03430037 and NCT03675724, created source/study/outcome/result/finding records documenting active no-posted-results status for both, logged exact registry surveillance queries and screening decisions, and submitted candidate_change coverage-gap-senolytics-registry-surveillance-breadth-followup-3-repair. The active-trials registry gap remains open for additional direct active/recruiting senolytic hits found in the bounded search but not source-snapshotted in this job.

proposed_records.rationale: Creates the submitted candidate-change ledger required for this coverage-repair proposal.

Updates the active-trials registry category to include source-snapshot-backed NCT03430037 and NCT03675724 no-posted-results records while preserving an open follow-up gap for additional ClinicalTrials.gov hits.
Adds a source-snapshot-backed registry finding that NCT03675724 is enrolling by invitation with no posted results section.
Adds a source-snapshot-backed registry finding that NCT03430037 is enrolling by invitation with no posted results section.

Retains the ClinicalTrials.gov v2 API retrieval metadata, hash, and status/results summary supporting the NCT03430037 no-posted-results records.
Retains the ClinicalTrials.gov v2 API retrieval metadata, hash, and status/results summary supporting the NCT03675724 no-posted-results records.

Creates the registry-only study record for the NCT03675724 AFFIRM-LITE fisetin frailty trial.
Creates the registry-only study record for the NCT03430037 AFFIRM fisetin frailty trial.
Records the bounded coverage-repair session and its outcome.
Records exact ClinicalTrials.gov v2 queries, dates, result counts, retrieved counts, and selected hit decisions for the surveillance pass.
Records inclusion, duplicate, and deferred decisions for registry hits discovered during the bounded surveillance pass.

blocking_issues: Broader ClinicalTrials.gov term surveillance found additional direct active/recruiting senolytic, fisetin, and D+Q candidates, but this bounded worker only retained source snapshots for NCT03430037 and NCT03675724; those additional hits must remain deferred until source-snapshot-backed follow-up.
